reference: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

source: Àì lè ṣe ìdìbò ló má ń fa àwọn ìfẹ̀hónú tó le hàn ní ọ̀pọ̀ ìgbà, àwọn kan ní 2011.
hypothesis: Failure to vote has often sparked violent protests, some in 2011.
reference: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

source: Ọ́fìsì tó ń rísí ìsàkósó ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ pàjáwìrì fún ẹkùn Northern Marianas ti sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé kò sí àkọsílẹ̀ ìbàjẹ́ kankan ní orílẹ̀èdè náà.
hypothesis: The Office of Emergency Management for the Northern Marianas has confirmed that there are no records of corruption in the country.
reference: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

source: Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àwọn tí a mú ní ìdógó ni wọ́n ti gbà kalẹ̀, ṣùgbọ́n bíi mẹ́fà ni wọ́n sàfimúnlẹ̀ pé wọ́n ti kú.
hypothesis: Many of those arrested were imprisoned, but about six were presumed dead.
reference: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

source: Xinhua sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé àwọn asèwádìí ìjọba ti gba àpótí dúdú àkọọ́lẹ̀ ogun méjì padà lọ́jọ́ọ̀rú.
hypothesis: Xinhua reported that government investigators had recovered two historical black boxes from the war earlier in the day.
reference: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

source: Asiwaju oniwúra ti Olimpiki ló yẹ kó wẹ̀ ní eré 100m àti 200m igbasile àti eré ikọlẹ mẹ́ta ní Ìdíje Olimpiki, ṣùgbọ́n torípé ó fohùn lẹ̀ wọn ṣàríyanjiyàn bó ya ara rẹ̀ yá gá.
hypothesis: The Olympic champion was supposed to swim in the 100m and 200m breaststroke and the triple jump at the Olympics, but because of her voice controversy, she became disillusioned.
reference: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.
